name: FAI_INSTRUCTIONS_VL
query: select B.INSTRUCTION_ID, B.TOPIC_ID, B.INSTRUCTION_CODE, B.INTERNAL_NAME, B.INSTRUCTION, B.SEEDED_FLAG, B.STATUS, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, T.NAME, T.DESCRIPTION FROM FAI_INSTRUCTIONS_B B, FAI_INSTRUCTIONS_TL T WHERE B.INSTRUCTION_ID = T.INSTRUCTION_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
